subcodes.first_line: O thou who speaketh forth in praise of the Ancient Beauty and the Most Great Name! If thou wouldst gain tidings of the bounties of the clouds of the Abhá Kingdom [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ناطق بثنای جمال قدم و اسم اعظم اگر از فیض سحائب ملکوت ابهی خبر گیری نعره
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @praise and encouragement, @wine as symbol of spiritual transformation, @firmness in the Covenant
